title: Hard interruption at 8 kHz telephony sample rate

transcript.agent: Alright, your balance is one hundred and forty two dollars and it is due on the...
transcript.caller: hold on, can you repeat the amount

why_it_matters: The same interruption as scenario 01, resampled to the 8 kHz narrowband rate used on PSTN and SIP calls. Turn detectors and VAD front ends tuned or trained at 16 kHz frequently regress at 8 kHz, so an agent that yields cleanly in the browser can talk over callers on the phone. Run this fixture through your telephony path, not just your web path.
